issue_title: Copy paste in the filter field also updates the value of the cell if highlighted
issue_body_preview:
**Describe the bug**
When you are pasting something in a filter field it also pastes in a feld in Rowy if its selected. 

**To Reproduce**
See video: 
https://github.com/rowyio/rowy/assets/307298/585db437-674a-4dfa-b95a-951cf1c6a146

**Expected behavior**
The paste should only be in the filt
test_description_zh: 在表格中选中某个单元格，然后打开列的筛选功能，在筛选输入框中执行粘贴操作（Ctrl+V / Cmd+V），观察被选中的单元格的值是否发生变化。
expected_result_zh: 粘贴操作仅作用于筛选输入框，筛选框中正确显示粘贴的内容；被选中的表格单元格的值不应被修改或受到粘贴操作的影响。
